items.title: Celtic to face Rangers in Scottish Cup quarter-finals
items.summary: Rangers host Old Firm rivals Celtic and holders Aberdeen face a potential trip to Dunfermline in the Scottish Cup quarter-finals.

items.title: Haaland earns City dramatic late win at Liverpool
items.summary: Erling Haaland kept Manchester City in the title race with an added-time penalty as Pep Guardiola's side came from behind to win 2-1 in a chaotic finish.

items.title: Pep warns Arsenal: 'A lot can happen' in title race
items.summary: Pep Guardiola has warned Arsenal that 'a lot can happen in 13 games' as the Premier League title race heats up.

items.title: Arne Slot: Marc Guéhi should have been sent off
items.summary: Arne Slot has said Marc Guéhi should have been shown a red card for his challenge on Mohamed Salah in Liverpool's 2-1 defeat to Manchester City.

items.title: 5-star PSG thrash Marseille in Le Classique
items.summary: Ousmane Dembélé's double helped Paris Saint-Germain claim a thumping 5-0 victory in their Le Classique meeting with Marseille at the Parc des Princes.

items.title: Scorende Goes in zak en as: 'Deze hakt er wel in'
items.summary: Het doelpunt van Wouter Goes bleek niet genoeg voor een nieuwe zege van AZ op Ajax, want in de blessuretijd kwamen de bezoekers nog op gelijke hoogte . Verslaggever Kalum van Oudheusden sprak met de scorende verdediger van AZ, die zijn teleurstelling niet kon verbergen.

items.title: VI Live: nieuw puntenverlies dreigt voor Benfica in strijd om Portugese titel
items.summary: Zondag staat ons een fraaie voetbaldag te wachten. De duels van Feyenoord, Ajax en PSV volgen we in aparte liveblogs, maar in deze VI Live blijf je op de hoogte van alle andere duels. Bijvoorbeeld van de Engelse topper tussen Liverpool en Manchester City.

items.title: Who has made Troy's Premier League team of the week?
items.summary: After every round of Premier League matches this season Troy Deeney gives us his team of the week. Do you agree with his choices?

items.title: Real Madrid worstelt zich zonder Vinicius en Bellingham langs Valencia
items.summary: Real Madrid heeft zondagavond een moeizame zege geboekt bij Valencia. In afwezigheid van Vinicius Júnior, Rodrygo en Jude Bellingham moest de eerste treffer komen van een verdediger.

items.title: Taylor en Koopmeiners houden elkaar in evenwicht na extreem late kopgoal
items.summary: Juventus blijft in eigen huis dit seizoen voorlopig ongeslagen in de Serie A. De Oude Dame leek in het Allianz Stadium verslagen te worden door Lazio, maar door een treffer in de diepe blessuretijd werd het alsnog gelijk.

items.title: PSG vernedert De Lange en Timber met recordzege in Le Classique
items.summary: Paris Saint-Germain heeft Olympique Marseille met de grond gelijk gemaakt. De Franse landskampioen boekte de grootste overwinning ooit in Le Classique , waaraan Jeffrey de Lange en Quinten Timber deelnamen.

items.title: Man City's comeback thriller keeps Premier League title hopes alive; Liverpool slip further
items.summary: Liverpool looked set to win, but Man City's two unanswered goals means the Premier League title race stays alive and Liverpool's Champions League hopes are in doubt.

items.title: 'The hope is there' - how Man City 'just' kept themselves in title race
items.summary: A generation of Manchester City supporters has not experienced a winning feeling at Anfield, but all that changed on a highly dramatic Sunday evening as they fought back for a thrilling 2-1 Premier League victory.

items.title: 'Killjoy' - did VAR get late drama in Liverpool v Man City right?
items.summary: Manchester City's win at Liverpool ended in complete chaos - but did the referee and the VAR get Dominik Szoboszlai's red card right?

items.title: 'I know who I am' - Chelsea boss Bompastor defiant after tough week
items.summary: Chelsea manager Sonia Bompastor has not had many tougher weeks in her managerial career and was defiant following their win at Tottenham.

items.title: Manchester City must improve to catch Arsenal, says Pep Guardiola
items.summary: City earn dramatic comeback win at Liverpool ‘The title race is over if we lost this game’ Pep Guardiola claimed Manchester City are “breathing down the necks” of Arsenal after their ­remarkable victory at Liverpool but must improve to reel in the Premier League leaders. City were staring at another Anfield defeat that would have left them nine points adrift of Arsenal following Dominik Szoboszlai’s outstanding 74th‑minute free-kick. But late goals from Bernardo Silva and Erling Haaland reduced the gap to six points and delivered City’s first win at Anfield in front of a crowd since 2003. Continue reading...

items.title: Neville: Wins won't force Man Utd into Carrick appointment now
items.summary: Gary Neville says Manchester United will not be "bounced" into making a decision to give Michael Carrick the manager's job after a run of great results.

items.title: 'A long way back' - Carra expects Liverpool to miss out on CL spots
items.summary: Jamie Carragher expects Liverpool to miss out on Champions League qualification through the Premier League.

items.title: Greaves prepares for PDC ProTour with perfect Women's Series weekend
items.summary: Beau Greaves kicked off the 2026 Women's Series with a perfect weekend in Germany as she made it 113 wins on the spin and 17 consecutive titles.

items.title: Haaland scores stoppage-time penalty to seal DRAMATIC win over Liverpool!
items.summary: Highlights from the Premier League match between Liverpool and Manchester City.
